item.title: KMiri: Fix `pop_level` panics by not reducing guard_level if range fits the entry
item.body:
Fix https://github.com/KMiri-rs/KMiri/issues/71

* stop guard page level from going down when the rage fits the huge page
* add two test cases
  * `map_huge_page_in_exact_huge_range` fails before the fix, and succeeds after the fix
  * `map_base_pages_one_by_one_in_exact_huge_range` succeeds before and after the fix
* osdk: support multiple test names
* Makefile: narrow `make ktest` to test the two cases only

repo.name: asterinas
repo.description: Asterinas aims to be a production-grade Linux alternative—memory safe, high-performance, and more.

repo.name: asterinas
repo.description: Asterinas aims to be a production-grade Linux alternative—memory safe, high-performance, and more.

issue.title: KMiri: Fix `pop_level` panics by not reducing guard_level if range fits the entry
issue.body:
Fix https://github.com/KMiri-rs/KMiri/issues/71

* stop guard page level from going down when the rage fits the huge page
* add two test cases
  * `map_huge_page_in_exact_huge_range` fails before the fix, and succeeds after the fix
  * `map_base_pages_one_by_one_in_exact_huge_range` succeeds before and after the fix
* osdk: support multiple test names
* Makefile: narrow `make ktest` to test the two cases only

issue_comments.body:
澄钧回复：

> 我感觉确实是星绽ostd的问题，本质的问题就是目前的lock_range其实是按照之后会映射正常的页（不是large page）来进行lock的。如果之后要映射large page，会改动到更上一层的pte, 就会出问题。你这个PR这样改之后，那个地方是不会出问题了，但是如果你要在2MB范围内一个小页一个小页进行映射，就又会有问题，因为最下层的guard没有拿到。
>
> https://github.com/asterinas/asterinas/pull/2613 俊扬有个PR应该是包含了这个问题的修复，我不确定你pick这个过去方不方便...[笑哭] 如果不方便想要快速绕过去的话，可能可以复制一套API专门用于初始化场景会映射大页的情况进行lock range

files.patch:
@@ -365,13 +365,17 @@ test:
 		cargo test $(addprefix -p ,$(TEST_PACKAGE_NAMES)); \
 	fi
 
+TEST_CASE ?= \
+						 map_huge_page_in_exact_huge_range \
+						 map_base_pages_one_by_one_in_exact_huge_range
+
 .PHONY: ktest
 ktest: CONSOLE = ttyS0
 ktest: initramfs $(CARGO_OSDK)
 	@# cargo-osdk tests default workspace members.
 	@# `linux-bzimage-setup` is left out of `default-members`
 	@# because it is hard to unit test.
-	@cargo osdk test $(CARGO_OSDK_TEST_ARGS)
+	@cd ostd && cargo osdk test $(TEST_CASE) $(CARGO_OSDK_TEST_ARGS)
 
 .PHONY: docs
 docs: private DEFAULT_PACKAGE_NAMES = \

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+services:
+  asterinas:
+    # 使用变量插值
+    image: ${IMAGE_NAME}
+    container_name: asterinas_dev  # 固定名称，方便下次直接 start
+    privileged: true
+    network_mode: host
+    volumes:
+      - ${ASTER_SRC_DIR}:/asterinas
+    # 模拟 -it 参数，保证容器不自动退出且可以交互
+    stdin_open: true 
+    tty: true
+    # 指定工作目录（可选）
+    working_dir: /asterinas

@@ -4,10 +4,16 @@
 
 set -e
 
-SCRIPT_DIR=$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )
-ASTER_SRC_DIR=${SCRIPT_DIR}/../..
-CARGO_TOML_PATH=${SCRIPT_DIR}/../../Cargo.toml
-VERSION=$( cat ${ASTER_SRC_DIR}/VERSION )
-IMAGE_NAME="asterinas/asterinas:${VERSION}"
+export SCRIPT_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)
+export ASTER_SRC_DIR=${SCRIPT_DIR}/../..
+export CARGO_TOML_PATH=${SCRIPT_DIR}/../../Cargo.toml
+export VERSION=$(cat ${ASTER_SRC_DIR}/VERSION)
+export IMAGE_NAME="asterinas/asterinas:${VERSION}"
 
-docker run -it --privileged --network=host -v /dev:/dev -v ${ASTER_SRC_DIR}:/root/asterinas ${IMAGE_NAME}
+#docker run -it --privileged --network=host -v /dev:/dev -v ${ASTER_SRC_DIR}:/root/asterinas ${IMAGE_NAME}
+
+# 2. 使用 docker compose 启动
+docker compose up -d
+
+# 3. “进入”环境
+docker compose exec asterinas fish

commit.message:
kmiri: fix guard_level by not reducing the level if range fits entry

close https://github.com/KMiri-rs/KMiri/issues/71
Makefile: `make ktest` for specific test cases

page_table: add map_huge_page test cases

cc https://github.com/KMiri-rs/KMiri/issues/71
